title: carex divisa
intro: Carex divisa, also known as the sedge or hairy sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Carex divisa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
